scripts.build: sh -c "rm -rf ./dist && mkdir -p ./dist && bun run generate:api && bun build ./src/main.ts ./src/desktop-core.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --entry-naming='[name].[ext]' --chunk-naming='[name].[ext]' --asset-naming='[name].[ext]' && cp ./src/index.html ./dist/index.html && cp ./src/styles.css ./dist/styles.css"
scripts.build:watch: sh -c "mkdir -p ./dist && cp ./src/index.html ./dist/index.html && cp ./src/styles.css ./dist/styles.css && bun run generate:api && bun build ./src/main.ts ./src/desktop-core.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --entry-naming='[name].[ext]' --chunk-naming='[name].[ext]' --asset-naming='[name].[ext]' --watch"
